## Summary

Describe the platform template change and affected manifests, scripts, or catalogs.

## Validation

List the commands you ran, or explain why a command was not applicable.

## Checklist

- [ ] Rendered `out/` bundles and local env files are not committed.
- [ ] Secrets and cluster credentials are not committed.
- [ ] Public image and example-host defaults remain safe.
- [ ] Docs are updated for changed profiles, values, manifests, or scripts.
